name: OpenACP
description: Self-hosted bridge that lets you interact with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) from messaging platforms (Telegram, Discord, etc.) via the Agent Client Protocol (ACP).
summaryZh: Self-hosted bridge that lets you interact with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) from messaging platforms (Telegram, Discord, etc.) via the Agent Client Protocol (ACP). 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
